error_string: Warning: spec.SessionAffinity is ignored for headless services

required_files.rationale: Contains the warning generation function that produces 'spec.SessionAffinity is ignored for headless services'. The format string is directly in this file.
Test file for warnings, updated in fix PR to test the SessionAffinity condition.

error_chain: User creates or updates a headless Service
API server validation runs warnings check
Bug: defaults SessionAffinity to 'None' which is indistinguishable from user-set
Warning fires even when user didn't explicitly set SessionAffinity
trigger_conditions: SessionAffinity field is defaulted to 'None' (not explicitly set by user)
Warning incorrectly fires because it can't distinguish default from explicit
